entity.description: Speed into the high-octane action of Formula 1 with a 5-pack of Hot Wheels Formula 1 race cars in 1:64 scale. Each die-cast vehicle features graphics of five of the hottest racing teams on the circuit. The set is designed for true automotive enthusiasts who appreciate the legacy and collectability of a Hot Wheels and Formula 1 collaboration. Put them on display or recreate legendary moments from the pinnacle of motorsport on Hot Wheels tracks. Race into the pole position of legendary Hot Wheels collections with a 5-pack of 1:64 scale Formula 1 race cars.

product.description:
Each piece is crafted with care to ensure safety and durability, making it a perfect choice for young, imaginative minds eager to explore the culinary world.

- Suitable for 3+ Years
- Made with high-quality sturdy BPA-Free plastic
- Music and sound stimulation
- Promote the understanding of cause and effect
- Battery operated (batteries not included)

metaData.Key Information:
The Maya & Friends Breakfast Fun Kitchen Play Set is a delightful addition to any child's playtime, fostering creativity and the joy of cooking from a young age.

Designed for children aged 3 and up, this set includes a colourful toy toaster that adds a touch of realism to pretend play. Accompanying the toaster is an array of toy kitchenware, allowing little ones to mimic the process of preparing a hearty breakfast.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Maya & Friends Breakfast Fun Kitchen Play Set
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

product.name: Maya & Friends Breakfast Fun Kitchen Play Set

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

product.description:
• The toaster mouth lights up for phrases and five sing-along songs
• Use the handle to pop up the toast whilst being introduced to opposites
• Turn the dial to choose whether you would like light or dark toast

metaData.Key Information:
• Little chefs can cook up a tasty breakfast of eggs, bacon and berry jam on toast with interactive buttons ensuring foods, colours and numbers are on the menu with the Yum-2-3 Toaster Ages: 1-3 years
• Pretend to cook up and serve a delicious breakfast for a friend using the nine different foods and utensils
• Press the one, two, three food buttons to learn about numbers, colors, food names and recipes
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: LeapFrog Yum-2-3 Toaster

product.description: Nurture with a spin! Zoom into Paradise! Turn the dial to take care of your Tamagotchi character: Zoom from cell to space for traditional nurturing play - clean the poop, feed them delicious food and make them feel better! Play new mini games and nurturing activities and shop in the new LAB MODE CHARACTERS: Raise more than 50,000 Tamagotchi characters: Depending on the environment and the way you take care of your Tamagotchi character, you can grow over 50 different characters in 12 species: Plus, BREED play creates more Tamagotchi characters by bringing parent's genes to the next generation CONNECT: Connect with friend's device directly to see how your characters interact - is it a good match or a bad match? THREE FIELDS. Start in the Land field and unlock the Water and Sky fields for different play and characters. The Pink Land device has a pretty pink and green shell Includes: • 1 Tamagotchi Device

tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

product.description: Set up shop and start selling slices with the Build-a-Slice Pizza Cart! This food cart has everything needed to run a small pretend pizza business including six toppings, a pizza cutter, plate, cheese shaker and more Ding! Ring the bell to hear a customer’s order and explore colors, shapes and food names They may ask for a slice of pizza with crunchy onion, cheese triangles or red pepperoni Scoop up the pizza with the magic spatula and it will let you know if you got the order right You can mix and match toppings to create your own pizza too Put it in the oven, set the temperature and the oven will say words in Italian, cooking phrases and play music while you wait Don’t cook the pizza too long or it’ll burn Pop the finished pizza in the box and complete the order Collect and count the play money Nice cookin’, chef! Add music to the dining experience by spinning the pizza turntable for learning songs and melodies.

metaData.Key Information: Pretend to make and sell the best pizza in town while exploring colors, shapes and food names Ages: 3-6 years.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place

product.name: LeapFrog Build-a-Slice Pizza Cart

offers.description: Buy 1 LeapFrog Build-a-Slice Pizza Cart @ $11.10 Off

metaData.Key Information: Is your little one a budding chef with a passion for cooking up imaginative feasts? With our Gourmet Chef's Kitchen Set, they can dive into a world of culinary exploration, complete with all the tools and accessories needed to whip up their own delicious make-believe meals. This Gourmet Chef's Kitchen Set is more than just a toy – it's an invitation to a world of culinary creativity, where your child can explore the joys of cooking, experiment with flavours, and share delightful meals with friends and family. Whether they aspire to be a gourmet chef or simply enjoy the magic of kitchen play, this toy set will turn every day into a delicious culinary adventure. Let the cooking and culinary imagination flow!
metaData.SAP Product Name: Tookytoy Wooden Kids Toys Gourmet Chef Kitchen Set

metaData.Key Information: All aboard for endless fun! The Connetix 50 Piece Pastel Transport Pack invites little builders to design their own vehicles and transport worlds using beautifully soft-toned magnetic tiles. With a mix of standard tiles, windows, and unique motion bases, kids can explore STEM concepts while driving their creativity.

metaData.Key Information: Brighten playtime with the Connetix Light Star Pack 28 Pieces, the ultimate fusion of creativity, construction, and light exploration.  This set includes pentagons, squares, and equilateral triangles in all eight vibrant colours, plus a rechargeable light-up tile that transforms every build into a dazzling lightshow. With three brightness settings and endless possibilities, children can explore science, creativity, and storytelling through hands-on, open-ended play. Non-toxic ABS plastic, BPA and Phthalate free.

product.description:
• Use the magic ice cream scooper to scoop and serve ice cream The scooper will recognise the colours and flavours
• Role-play fun - Pretend to run your own ice cream cart Push the cart and look for new customers
• Order up! - Follow the order card instructions to build treats for six animal customers ranging from easy to hard challenges
• Includes four ice cream flavours, three toppings and three syrup flavors
• Your total comes to - Ring up orders using the cash register
• Sweet counting - Press the pump to add pretend syrup and count along

metaData.Key Information: Get the scoop on learning! Learning is sweet when pretending to run your own ice cream cart Create imaginative and tasty-looking ice cream combinations using delicious ice cream flavors and toppings Ages: 2-5 years.
